49],[299,541,1776539462664],[297,538,1776539462679],[297,537,1776539462697],[297,535,1776539462712],[298,535,1776539462726],[298,534,1776539462734],[298,533,1776539462737],[299,533,1776539462741],[300,532,1776539462748],[300,531,1776539462761],[301,530,1776539462770],[301,529,1776539462776],[302,528,1776539462790],[302,526,1776539462795],[303,525,1776539462813],[304,524,1776539462822],[305,522,1776539462843],[306,522,1776539462847],[306,521,1776539462861],[307,521,1776539462868],[308,521,1776539462880],[309,521,1776539462903],[310,521,1776539462910],[311,521,1776539462921],[312,521,1776539462927],[313,521,1776539462935],[315,521,1776539462953],[316,521,1776539462962],[317,521,1776539462975],[318,521,1776539462987],[319,521,1776539462999],[319,522,1776539463008],[320,522,1776539463016],[319,522,1776539463046],[318,522,1776539463073]],"mm-mp":17.575728155339807,"md":[[307,520,1776539462862]],"md-mp":4100.5,"mu":[[307,520,1776539463000]],"mu-mp":4118.0},"v":1,"tc":{}}
